results.title: 01 seam in the ordinary sky
results.prompt: Use case: precise-object-edit. Asset type: cinematic storyboard opening frame. Image 1 is the edit target and controls Tina, product, car interior, street, camera, and daylight. Preserve everything except one tiny atmospheric detail. High in the blue sky outside the passenger window, add a very fine curved seam and a thumbnail-sized translucent corner beginning to lift like clear fruit skin. It is barely visible against the clouds. Tina still studies the peeled gummy and has not noticed. The car is fully intact and enclosed. Ordinary realism first, anomaly second.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one frame from a coherent live-action Peelerz commercial sequence. Maintain Tina as the same young woman with long brown hair, blue jacket, black top, pink lychee gummy, and pink Peelerz package. Photoreal cinematic advertising with tactile real-world materials. The sky behaves as one peelable atmospheric membrane. Elegant, buoyant, and benign; no generic rainbow, candyland, explosion, disaster, captions, panel borders, watermarks, or extra characters.

results.title: 02 tina sees the sky peel back
results.prompt: Use case: identity-preserve. Asset type: cinematic storyboard reaction frame. Image 1 controls Tina, product, car, camera, neighborhood, and photographic realism. Image 2 supplies only the sky membrane concept. Tina looks upward through the window as wind catches the lifted corner. A broad strip of ordinary blue afternoon sky peels backward overhead with a thin translucent pink edge, revealing a deep fruit-night atmosphere beneath it: sparse lychee-like moons, a few botanical constellations, and enormous depth. Keep most of the street and sky ordinary so the moving boundary is legible. The car remains intact. Avoid decorative clutter and floating islands.

results.title: 03 sky peel catches the car
results.prompt: Use case: compositing. Asset type: cinematic storyboard action frame. Image 1 controls Tina's identity, product, neighborhood, and the translucent sky-peel material. Image 2 supplies only the wide exterior idea of the car opening around seated Tina. Reject its orange gummy upholstery, completed rainbow parachute, empty sky, and flying pose. From a passenger-side exterior tracking view, show the long peeled ribbon of sky sweeping down in the wind and catching the roof seam of the moving car. The blue-gray roof and upper side skin peel backward with it in two continuous flexible layers. Tina stays seated in the intact black frame holding the gummy and bag. The street remains below; this is the instant before lift. Smooth material continuity, no debris or crash.

results.title: 04 peeled shell becomes the canopy
results.prompt: Use case: compositing. Asset type: cinematic storyboard transition frame. Image 1 controls Tina's identity, pink lychee product, sky membrane, neighborhood, and fruit-night opening. Image 2 supplies only the readable low-angle silhouette of a person lifted beneath a canopy; reject its generic rainbow fabric and empty blue background. Show Tina just above the same residential street, secured in the recognizable detached rear car seat, holding the glowing lychee gummy and Peelerz bag. Above her, the car's peeled roof and the translucent pink-edged sky membrane have joined into one enormous soft lychee-skin canopy, pale pearl outside and luminous blush inside. Behind it, part of the afternoon sky remains peeled back to reveal the sparse fruit-night cosmos. This is the earned beginning of flight, not a separate parachute appearing from nowhere.
